tasks.subject: [client-direct-sse] [P1] Delete client relay chat test file
tasks.description:
Delete the relay-specific client chat test file that tests code paths being removed in task 1.1.

## Files Deleted
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/model/__tests__/use-chat-session-relay.test.ts`

## Implementation Steps

1. Delete the file `apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/model/__tests__/use-chat-session-relay.test.ts`

This file tests the relay message code path in `use-chat-session.ts` — specifically:
- `waitForStreamReady()` polling
- Relay EventSource with `stream_ready`, `relay_message`, `sync_update` events
- `correlationId` filtering on relay messages
- Staleness detection timer
- `sendMessageRelay()` calls
- Refetch suppression when relay is enabled

All of these code paths are being removed in task 1.1. The direct SSE path already has test coverage in `use-chat-session.test.ts`. No replacement tests are needed.

## Non-Goals
- Do NOT delete or modify other relay test files (e.g., `relay.test.ts`, `relay-conversations.test.ts`, `relay-bindings-integration.test.ts`) — those test relay UI features that remain.
- Do NOT remove `useRelayEnabled` from its source module (`@/layers/entities/relay`) — it is still used by relay UI panels.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/model/__tests__/use-chat-session-relay.test.ts` no longer exists
- [ ] `pnpm test -- --run` passes (no broken imports referencing the deleted file)
- [ ] Other relay test files remain untouched

tasks.subject: [client-direct-sse] [P3] Delete server-side relay chat test files
tasks.description:
Delete the server-side test files that test the relay dispatch path in `sessions.ts`. These test code paths that no longer exist after task 2.1.

## Files Deleted
- `apps/server/src/routes/__tests__/sessions-relay.test.ts`
- `apps/server/src/routes/__tests__/sessions-relay-correlation.test.ts`

## Non-Goals
- Do NOT delete `relay.test.ts`, `relay-conversations.test.ts`, or `relay-bindings-integration.test.ts` — those test relay infrastructure and UI features that remain.

## Rationale
`sessions-relay.test.ts` tests:
- Relay dispatch via `publishViaRelay()` returning 202
- `stream_ready` event emission on GET `/stream`
- Relay-disabled fallback to SSE

`sessions-relay-correlation.test.ts` tests:
- Correlation ID filtering on relay messages
- Per-message correlation ID generation

All of these code paths are removed in task 2.1. The direct SSE path already has test coverage in `sessions.test.ts`.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `sessions-relay.test.ts` no longer exists
- [ ] `sessions-relay-correlation.test.ts` no longer exists
- [ ] `pnpm test -- --run` passes
- [ ] Other relay test files (`relay.test.ts`, `relay-conversations.test.ts`, `relay-bindings-integration.test.ts`) remain untouched

tasks.subject: [client-direct-sse] [P3] Update remaining test files to remove relay chat mocks
tasks.description:
Update any remaining test files that mock `relayEnabled` or reference the relay message path in the context of chat. Keep relay mocks that test relay UI features (adapter management, ConnectionsView).

## Files to Audit
- `apps/server/src/routes/__tests__/sessions.test.ts` — check for relay-related mocks or assertions
- Any other test files that reference `relayEnabled` in a chat context

## Implementation Steps

### 1. Audit `sessions.test.ts`
Check `apps/server/src/routes/__tests__/sessions.test.ts` for:
- Mocks of `isRelayEnabled` — remove if present (the import is deleted in sessions.ts)
- References to `publishViaRelay` — remove if present
- Comments referencing relay or legacy paths — update to reflect SSE-only

The file already has a comment at line 54: `// Legacy mockSessionBroadcaster removed — route now uses runtime.watchSession()`. If there are further relay references, remove them.

### 2. Search for `relayEnabled` mocks in chat test context
Search across `apps/client/` and `apps/server/` for test files that mock `relayEnabled` specifically for chat testing (not for relay UI panels). Remove those mocks.

Command to find candidates:
```bash
grep -rn 'relayEnabled\|isRelayEnabled\|useRelayEnabled' apps/*/src/**/__tests__/ --include='*.test.ts'
```

### 3. Do NOT modify these files
- Any test under `apps/server/src/services/relay/__tests__/` — relay infrastructure tests stay
- Any test under `apps/server/src/routes/__tests__/relay*.test.ts` (except the ones deleted in task 3.1) — relay API route tests stay
- Any test that mocks relay for testing relay UI panels (ConnectionsView, adapter management)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No test file references `isRelayEnabled` in a sessions/chat context (relay UI tests are fine)
- [ ] No test file references `publishViaRelay`
- [ ] `pnpm test -- --run` passes
- [ ] Relay infrastructure and UI tests remain untouched and passing
tasks.activeForm: Updating remaining test files to remove relay chat mocks

tasks.subject: [client-direct-sse] [P4] Remove 'legacy' labels from SSE code paths across codebase
tasks.description:
Search and update all "legacy" labels that reference SSE in the chat/sessions code. SSE is now the primary and only client transport — it should not be labeled as legacy.

## Files to Search
All files under `apps/client/src/` and `apps/server/src/` that reference "legacy" in the context of SSE.

## Implementation Steps

### 1. Search for legacy SSE references
Search for comments/labels containing "legacy" near SSE-related code. Based on the grep results, the following files need updates:

- `apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/model/use-chat-session.ts` — already handled in task 1.1 (comment updates)
- `apps/server/src/routes/sessions.ts` — already handled in task 2.1 (comment updates)
- `apps/server/src/routes/__tests__/sessions.test.ts` — line 54 comment `// Legacy mockSessionBroadcaster removed` — this refers to the broadcaster mock removal, not SSE. Leave it if it's about broadcaster, update if it's about SSE path.

### 2. Update remaining references
For each "legacy" reference found:
- If it refers to the SSE path being "legacy" compared to relay: remove the "legacy" qualifier
- If it refers to something else being legacy (e.g., trace-store legacy status values, database migration): leave it alone

### 3. Specific known updates
The trace-store "legacy" references (`apps/server/src/services/relay/trace-store.ts`) are about legacy TraceSpan shapes — NOT about SSE. Leave those untouched.

The `apps/site/` legacy references are about marketing components and shared UI — NOT about SSE. Leave those untouched.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No comments in `use-chat-session.ts`, `sessions.ts`, or `session-broadcaster.ts` label SSE as "legacy"
- [ ] Non-SSE "legacy" references (trace-store, site, DB migrations) remain unchanged
- [ ] TypeScript compiles cleanly
tasks.activeForm: Removing legacy labels from SSE code paths

tasks.subject: [client-direct-sse] [P4] Update architecture documentation to reflect SSE-only client transport
tasks.description:
Update `contributing/architecture.md` to note that SSE is the only client transport. Remove references to dual code paths (relay vs SSE) for the web client.

## Files Modified
- `contributing/architecture.md`

## Implementation Steps

### 1. Read the current architecture.md
Read the full file and identify sections that reference:
- Dual transport paths (relay + SSE) for the web client
- The relay message path as a client transport option
- "Legacy SSE" terminology

### 2. Update the Transport Interface section
The Transport interface section (visible in the first 50 lines) lists `sendMessageRelay` as a method. This method stays on the interface (backward compat), but the documentation should note it is used only by external adapters, not the web client.

Add a note like:
> `sendMessageRelay` is available for external adapter integration but the web client always uses `sendMessage` (direct SSE streaming).

### 3. Update any data flow descriptions
If the architecture doc describes the message flow for the web client, ensure it only describes the SSE path:
1. Client calls `transport.sendMessage()`
2. POST `/api/sessions/:id/messages` streams SSE events on the response body
3. Client processes events inline
4. When not streaming, persistent SSE connection (`GET /api/sessions/:id/stream`) receives `sync_update` events for cross-client sync

### 4. Remove relay-as-client-transport mentions
Remove any text that describes the relay bus as a transport option for the web client. Keep descriptions of relay for external adapters (Telegram, webhooks) and agent-to-agent communication.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `contributing/architecture.md` describes SSE as the sole client transport
- [ ] No references to relay as a web client transport remain
- [ ] `sendMessageRelay` is documented as external-adapter-only
- [ ] Relay documentation for external adapters and agent-to-agent communication remains intact
tasks.activeForm: Updating architecture documentation for SSE-only transport

tasks.subject: [client-direct-sse] [P5] Final verification — typecheck, tests, and dead import scan
tasks.description:
Run final verification across the entire codebase to ensure all changes are clean, no dead imports remain, and all tests pass.

## Verification Steps

### 1. TypeScript compilation
```bash
pnpm typecheck
```
Must compile cleanly with zero errors. Pay special attention to:
- `use-chat-session.ts` — removed refs and callbacks
- `sessions.ts` — removed imports and functions
- `session-broadcaster.ts` — removed methods and properties
- `claude-code-runtime.ts` — updated `setRelay()` signature

### 2. Run all tests
```bash
pnpm test -- --run
```
All tests must pass. The deleted test files should not cause failures (they're simply gone). Remaining tests should not reference deleted code.

### 3. Dead import scan
Search for orphaned imports that reference removed code:
```bash
# Check for imports of deleted items
grep -rn 'waitForStreamReady\|publishViaRelay\|subscribeToRelay\|unsubscribeFromRelay\|setRelay.*broadcaster' apps/
grep -rn 'resetStalenessTimer\|stalenessTimerRef\|streamReadyRef\|correlationIdRef' apps/client/
```

### 4. Verify relay infrastructure is intact
Confirm these files/features are untouched:
- `packages/relay/` — entire package intact
- `apps/server/src/services/relay/` — relay-state.ts, adapter-manager.ts, trace-store.ts intact
- `apps/server/src/routes/relay.ts` — relay API routes intact
- `apps/client/src/layers/entities/relay/` — `useRelayEnabled()` hook intact
- `apps/server/src/index.ts` — RelayCore initialization intact
- Relay UI panels (ConnectionsView, adapter management) — intact

### 5. Verify `sendMessageRelay` interface contract
Confirm `sendMessageRelay()` still exists on:
- `Transport` interface (`packages/shared/src/transport.ts`)
- `HttpTransport` implementation
- `DirectTransport` implementation

### 6. Lint check
```bash
pnpm lint
```
No new lint errors should be introduced.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes with zero errors
- [ ] `pnpm test -- --run` passes with zero failures
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes (or only pre-existing warnings)
- [ ] No dead imports referencing removed code
- [ ] Relay infrastructure and UI features confirmed intact
- [ ] `sendMessageRelay()` confirmed on Transport interface
- [ ] Web client sends messages via direct SSE regardless of `DORKOS_RELAY_ENABLED` setting
tasks.activeForm: Running final verification across the codebase
